name: Essex Golf Center
about: Essex Golf Center is a year-round golf practice and learning facility in Roseland, New Jersey, combining a 48-stall heated driving range with modern golf simulators and professional club fitting services. The venue offers PGA Tour Simulators with over 100 courses, TaylorMade club fitting, and private or group lessons from PGA Teaching Professionals. It operates with extended hours, including sunrise-to-9PM access to the driving range and a short game area, providing a comprehensive environment for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: Brand new PGA Tour Simulators with over 100 courses
TaylorMade club fitting with personalized equipment solutions
Heated 48-stall driving range for year-round practice
PGA Teaching Professionals offering private and group lessons
Family-friendly environment with junior golf camps and clinics

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Brand new simulators with over 100 courses

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you'll need to bring your own clubs for driving range and simulator use, though club fitting services are available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No external food or drink is mentioned as allowed; the venue does not appear to have a kitchen or bar service.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: Estimated time is not specified, but typical rounds on simulators usually take 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Essex Golf Center offers junior golf camps, introductory clinics for kids, and a family-friendly environment suitable for all ages.
